prompt.content:
Use file “Onc_Patient 9” to access the entire medical history / record for the patient. Please use the patient tab as the source of truth for all demographic information. Disregard patient identifiers (Name, Age, DOB, MRN) found within the text of the clinicalnotes tab as they have been shifted for de-identification purposes

-----

The patient presents to her oncologist for follow-up.
Reference files "Onc_Patient 9","Onc_Patient 9 script.pdf", and "Path.pdf".

What is this patient's MD Anderson Neoadjuvant Therapy Outcomes (CPS+EG) Score? What is this patient's 5-year Distant Metastasis Free Survival incorporating estrogen receptor status and nuclear grade? Provide clinical reasoning.

extra.task_name: Labs_Image_AI Scribe_Onc Patient 9 - CPS+EG Score - Eliane

golden_responses.golden_text_response:
1. What is this patient's MD Anderson Neoadjuvant Therapy Outcomes (CPS+EG) Score? 
Clinical Stage IIIA - 1 point
Pathological Stage - 0 point
ER status: Tumor Marker - ER negative - 1 point
Grade 3 - 1 point 

Total Score  = 1 + 0 + 1 + 1  = 3

2. What is this patient's 5-year Distant Metastasis Free Survival incorporating estrogen receptor status and nuclear grade?
Concludes that the patient has an 87% 5-year distant metastasis disease free survival.
